Workflow.name: Workflow-Ascension-Leaver-Subprocess-Duo

Variable.name: duoUsername
Variable.Description: username attribute from Duo link; passed in from Leaver Wrapper

Workflow.Description: Handles Leaver Operations for the Duo Application.

Step.name: Do Sync
Step.Description: Calls the Duo Admin API to trigger a sync with AD. This step is intentionally designed to NOT result in workflow failure if the sync is unsuccessful due to 404 or 429 errors.

Script.Source:
String directoryKey = resolveDirectoryKey(identityName, duoUsername);
return syncDuoUserWithAD(duoUsername, directoryKey);

Step.name: Verify Deletions
Step.Description: Throws exceptions when attempted DELETE operations in earlier steps appear to have left objects on the Duo user that should have been purged. Waits at least two minutes before running.
